title: Welcome to Field Notes
author: Victor Gardner
excerpt: Field Notes is your central feed for important team updates, announcements, and changes everyone should know about.
content:
Field Notes is your central feed for important team updates, announcements, and changes everyone should know about.

The latest note always appears here on the home page. Click through to read the full post or browse older notes.

What you'll find here:
• Product launches and updates
• Policy changes and important announcements
• Wins, customer stories, and recognition
• Reminders about deadlines and events

Have something the team should know? Send it to Marketing and we'll get it posted.
